description: Create a custom 'New Incident' button in the TiddlyWiki sidebar (Page Controls) that generates a pre-formatted security incident report. Configure a template tiddler titled 'Incident Template' tagged with 'Security Incident' containing custom fields 'status' (Open) and 'severity' (Triage). The template body must include the exact headings '# Incident Summary', '# Indicators of Compromise (IoCs)', and '# Remediation Actions' (including the '#' and newlines). Create the sidebar button as a tiddler titled '$:/custom/buttons/NewIncident' tagged with '$:/tags/PageControls', using the caption 'New Incident' and description 'Create a new security incident report'. The button must trigger the creation of a new tiddler titled 'New Security Incident' based on the 'Incident Template' and should include a visual icon.
